description: Demonstrate knowledge of the basic concepts of print.
subject: ELA

description: Demonstrate phonological awareness.
subject: ELA

description: Use knowledge of grade-appropriate phonics and word-analysis skills to decode words accurately.
subject: ELA

description: Recognize and read with automaticity grade-level high frequency words.
subject: ELA

description: Describe the main character(s), setting, and important events in a story.
subject: ELA

description: Explain the roles of author and illustrator of a story.
subject: ELA

description: Identify rhyme in a poem.
subject: ELA

description: Use titles, headings, and illustrations to predict and confirm the topic of texts.
subject: ELA

description: Identify the topic of and multiple details in a text.
subject: ELA

description: Explain the difference between opinions and facts about a topic.
subject: ELA

description: Identify and explain descriptive words in text(s).
subject: ELA

description: Retell a text orally to enhance comprehension: use main character(s), setting, and important events for a story; use topic and details for an informational text.
subject: ELA

description: Compare and contrast characters’ experiences in stories.
subject: ELA

description: Print many upper- and lowercase letters.
subject: ELA

description: Using a combination of drawing, dictating, and/or writing, create narratives with the events in chronological order.
subject: ELA

description: Using a combination of drawing, dictating, and/or writing, express opinions about a topic or text with at least one supporting reason.
subject: ELA

description: Using a combination of drawing, dictating, and/or writing, provide factual information about a topic.
subject: ELA

description: With guidance and support from adults, improve drawing and writing, as needed, by planning, revising, and editing.
subject: ELA

description: Present information orally using complete sentences.
subject: ELA

description: Follow the rules of standard English grammar, punctuation, capitalization, and spelling appropriate to grade level.
subject: ELA

description: Recall information to answer a question about a single topic.
subject: ELA

description: Use a multimedia element to enhance oral or written tasks.
subject: ELA

description: Use grade-level academic vocabulary appropriately in speaking and writing.
subject: ELA

description: Ask and answer questions about unfamiliar words in grade-level content.
subject: ELA

description: Identify and sort common words into basic categories, relating vocabulary to background knowledge.
subject: ELA
